expertAssessments.rationale: The changed stable-server natural-language phrase was exercised through the production AI sidebar and returned the deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking provider with ascending CPU ranking.
The answer is grounded in current monitoring metrics and shows concrete server IDs and CPU percentages instead of a generic fallback.
The recheck used Playwright MCP against Vercel production, verified the version/health endpoints, and recorded durable run evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.12.62 production deploy and targeted Q4 Playwright MCP recheck; effective usage 17.9292 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no billed overage observed.

artifacts.label: v8.12.62 Q4 stable-server ranking Playwright MCP evidence

completedImprovements.title: Q4 안정적인 서버 질의가 fallback 또는 상위 랭킹으로 가지 않고 하위 랭킹으로 처리
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.62 Playwright MCP AI sidebar prompt '가장 안정적인 서버 알려줘' returned 'CPU 사용률 하위 3대' via monitoring-metric-ranking and did not contain 'CPU 사용률 상위'.
completedImprovements.note: v8.12.61 fixed MIN_METRIC_PATTERN coverage but production QA found planner intentFrame still defaulted to desc; v8.12.62 fixed normalizeRankOrder for 안정/안전 wording.

notes: Release decision for the tested Q4 scope: go.
Q1/Q2/Q3/Q6 remain separate follow-up items from the user's broader analysis and were not changed or revalidated in this Q4-only run.
